name: rewire-break-the-cycle-alter-your-thoughts-and-create-lasting-change
description: Nicole Vignola's Rewire — a neuroscience-based, three-phase protocol for breaking negative thought patterns and building lasting change through neuroplasticity.
useCase: Break negative thought patterns, rewire your brain through neuroplasticity, and build lasting habits using three-phase protocol.
knownRisks: Neuroscience concepts may be oversimplified for popular audience
Individual results vary depending on underlying mental health conditions
Some studies cited may have been simplified or generalized
